title: Configuring a project
description:
Configuring a project

Configuring a project
see_also:
Each application project you create must be configured properly before you can run the application.

There are two commands in the Project Menu that allow you to configure a project: Edit and Properties.

Editing a project

Select Edit from the Project Menu to open the Edit Project dialog.  From this dialog, you configure which programs, include files, and point files are used in the current project.

For details on Project | Edit, see Edit Command (Project Menu).

Edit Command (Project Menu)
